summary: Killer first set highlighted by a space‑y China Doll; recording quality not discussed.
review: The reviewer raves about the first set as “just so killer” and especially loves the out‑of‑space vibe of China Doll. No comments are made about the tape source or sound fidelity, so the technical side remains unclear. Overall the impression is highly positive despite the lack of recording details.

ai_rating.rationale: Strong praise for the musical performance (first‑set killer, standout China Doll) combined with no negative remarks; recording quality is unknown, so rating leans on show quality.

recording_quality.technical_notes: No specific comments about sound clarity, mix or source type were provided in the review.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Reviewer describes the first set as “just so killer,” indicating a high‑energy opening; no further detail on pacing.
